ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT 1369 HYDE LTD. 626 BUSH, LTD. BALLARD, THOMAS D.D.S. INDIVIDUALLY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-14-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-24-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE ANSWERS SERVED ON JANUARY 4, 2005 STATE OBJECTIONS, THOUGH OBJECTIONS WERE PREVIOUSLY WAIVED BY THE UNTIMELY RESPONSES. PRODUCTION OF RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN THE CUSTODY OR CONTROL OF PLAINTIFF SHALL OCCUR NO LATER THAN JANUARY 28, 2005. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $486.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
NOTICE TO APPEAR AT TRIAL 2/14/05 9:00 A.M. DEPT. 206.
